description_long: This is a well-worn, two-seater sofa with a visibly distressed and faded fabric exterior, likely once a dark brown or gray but now mottled with lighter patches and signs of heavy use. The sofa features two large, attached seat cushions and two backrest cushions, all of which appear to be sagging and compressed from prolonged use. The armrests are wide, rounded, and heavily padded, matching the overall bulky and plush silhouette of the piece. The upholstery is visibly stained and scuffed, with areas of discoloration and wear, especially on the armrests and seat surfaces. The back of the sofa is plain and unadorned, with no visible legs, suggesting a low-profile or hidden leg design. This sofa would be commonly found discarded or left outdoors in urban environments, such as on sidewalks, in alleys, or near curbs.
description: A heavily worn, two-seater sofa with faded, stained upholstery and wide, padded armrests. The cushions are sagging and the fabric shows significant signs of use and discoloration.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large, attached seat cushions, two backrest cushions, and wide, rounded armrests with visible wear and discoloration.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thick, padded armrest and the sagging profile of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unadorned back with no visible legs and a slightly uneven surface.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the rounded armrest and the worn, faded upholstery along the side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, attached seat cushions and two attached backrest cushions, all uniform in size and visibly sagging.
attribute_armrest_style: Wide, rounded, and heavily padded armrests, extending slightly above the seat height with a plush, overstuffed profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or recessed design, likely positioned at the corners and possibly made of wood or plastic.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two attached, slightly overstuffed cushions forming a continuous surface.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color with a distressed, mottled appearance due to heavy wear; no visible decorative stitching or patterned detailing.
